title: Reclassify content_ref_missing: manual_error → fixable
description: F21: content_ref_missing is misclassified as manual_error even though doctor --fix's existing writeRuleMeta path can auto-recover. Routing miss at doctor.ts:271. Reclassify to fixable.

files.change: Line 271 area: change content_ref_missing classification from manual_error to fixable; route --fix to writeRuleMeta auto-recovery path
Add test: content_ref_missing reported as fixable; --fix invokes writeRuleMeta path
